name: com.shuaikx.quforia
displayName: Quforia - Vuforia Driver for Meta Quest
description: Bridges Vuforia's External Camera Driver Framework with Meta Quest's Passthrough Camera, enabling Vuforia image tracking on Quest devices.

samples.description: A sample scene demonstrating the capabilities of Quforia, showcasing Vuforia image tracking using Meta Quest's Passthrough Camera.
